languages.text: Стрельбы тут ведутся лишь одиночными — каждый патрон на счету.
Gunfire here is done in single shots only. Every bullet is precious.
languages.original_text: Стрельбы тут ведутся лишь одиночными — каждый патрон на счету.

traits.locale_text: Judging by the marks on the targets, they practice single shots only.
Judging by the marks on the targets, they practice single shots only.
Gunfire here is done in single shots only. Every bullet is precious.
Gunfire here is done in single shots only. Every bullet is precious.

languages.text: 这儿的枪只能单发射击。每颗子弹都很宝贵。
languages.original_text: Gunfire here is done in single shots only. Every bullet is precious.

traits.locale_text: 这儿的枪只能单发射击。每颗子弹都很宝贵。

languages.text: Burada silah sesleri sadece tekli atışlar şeklinde duyulur. Her mermi değerlidir.
languages.original_text: Gunfire here is done in single shots only. Every bullet is precious.

traits.locale_text: Burada silah sesleri sadece tekli atışlar şeklinde duyulur. Her mermi değerlidir.

languages.text: Ici, on tire seulement une balle à la fois. Les munitions sont une ressource précieuse.
languages.original_text: Gunfire here is done in single shots only. Every bullet is precious.

traits.locale_text: Ici, on tire seulement une balle à la fois. Les munitions sont une ressource précieuse.

languages.text: Aquí los disparos se hacen de uno en uno. Cada bala es un tesoro.
languages.original_text: Gunfire here is done in single shots only. Every bullet is precious.

traits.locale_text: Aquí los disparos se hacen de uno en uno. Cada bala es un tesoro.

languages.text: Hier werden nur einzelne Schüsse abgegeben. Jede Kugel ist kostbar.
languages.original_text: Gunfire here is done in single shots only. Every bullet is precious.

traits.locale_text: Hier werden nur einzelne Schüsse abgegeben. Jede Kugel ist kostbar.

languages.text: ここでの射撃は、単発のみで行われる。一発一発の弾丸が貴重なのだ。
languages.original_text: Gunfire here is done in single shots only. Every bullet is precious.

traits.locale_text: ここでの射撃は、単発のみで行われる。一発一発の弾丸が貴重なのだ。
